body.title: CLOSED: Refactor pe_chain into PeChain(IgorBase)
body.result: PeChain(IgorBase) hybrid refactor: phase functions → class methods with self.log; pure utilities stay module-level to preserve mock.patch semantics; 8 test files updated; 300 pe_chain tests green
body.description:
pe_chain.py is ~3500 lines of standalone functions (pe_entry_init, pe_plan, pe_situate, pe_hypothesize, pe_implement, etc.) sharing state via an explicit `basket` dict parameter. It is the only major Igor tool not extending IgorBase — meaning it cannot use self.log, time_it(), log_llm_io(), or log_state_snapshot(). T-d125-igorbase-drift and T-logging-class-inheritance-fixups both missed it.

Refactor into PeChain(IgorBase):
- basket dict becomes self.basket (instance state)
- All pe_xxx functions become methods: def pe_plan(self) reads/writes self.basket
- Module-level run_pe_chain() and run_pe_entry_chain() stay as thin wrappers that instantiate PeChain and call the entry method — zero change to callers
- Replace logging.getLogger(__name__) with self.log throughout
- Replace all forensic_logger.log_error lazy imports with self.log.error
- Replace forensic_logger.log_reasoning_call with self.log.info (include model/elapsed_ms/tokens in message)
- Update module docstring: add PeChain class to overview, note basket is now self.basket

Do NOT add new log sites in this ticket — that is T-pe-chain-flight-recorder. This ticket is structural refactor only.

**Affected files:** wild_igor/igor/tools/pe_chain.py
**Design rules:** OOP-first (class required), docs-live-in-code (module docstring must be updated)
**Scope boundary:** pe_chain.py only. Callers (run_pe_chain, run_pe_entry_chain) signatures unchanged. Forensic_logger migration: clean log_error → self.log.error and log_reasoning_call → self.log.info. Do not touch forensic_logger.log_inference_io — that is T-pe-chain-flight-recorder.
**Test plan:** All existing pe_chain tests pass unchanged after refactor. Run: cd ~/TheIgors && source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/ -x -q 2>&1 | head -40. Green is the gate — do not commit if any test fails.
